title: Old Netherite
body:
i saw a video from the minecraft's official youtube channel which contained an unused design for netherite, it looked cool so i remade it! i also made the ancient debris into a ore block, with the scraps being raw ore. 

the netherite block texture is a recolored diamond block texture because i thought, because its meant to be a older version of netherite, and since the armor looked more like the other armor types, i decided to make it a recolored version of the diamond block.

![the netherite in the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f94bdcfea41fbedb6bfb5fb724977252c5460944.png)

you can use this in your modpacks btw
